_doc: SOURCE OF TRUTH for main's required status checks.
Reconciled onto the live branch protection by .github/workflows/branch-protection-reconcile.yml
on every push to main (and via workflow_dispatch). Edit THIS file to change required checks —
never the GitHub UI; live drift is overwritten on the next push to main.
The REST endpoint PATCH .../required_status_checks REPLACES the whole contexts array, so the
reconcile script rebuilds it from `always` + the `guarded` entries whose freeze-guard passes.
Dropping a context here = un-requiring it. Adding one = requiring it (it MUST be reportable on
every PR, i.e. its job uses a JOB-LEVEL `if:` gate, never a workflow-level path filter).
`always`  : contexts pinned unconditionally (their workflows already report on every PR).
`guarded` : contexts pinned ONLY when `workflow` uses `pull_request: {}` (job-level gating).
If the workflow regresses to a workflow-level path filter, the reconcile script
DROPS the context from required (prevents an 'Expected'-forever freeze) and warns.
